specs.title: Technical Excellence
specs.subtitle: Designed for the track. Refined for the road.
specs.engineDesc: 4.0-litre naturally aspirated flat-six boxer engine with motorsport-derived technology.
specs.transmissionDesc: 7-speed PDK (Porsche Doppelkupplung) transmission with extremely short shift times.
specs.aerodynamicsDesc: Active aerodynamics and rear wing with DRS system for maximum downforce.

design.title: Aerodynamic Perfection
design.subtitle: Form follows function. Every surface wind-tunnel optimized, every detail engineered for maximum downforce and minimum drag.
design.carbonBodyDesc: Lightweight CFRP construction for optimal performance.
design.rearWingDesc: DRS system with multiple positions for speed and stability.

interior.title: Driver-Focused Cockpit
interior.subtitle: Every control, every surface designed around the driver. Motorsport-inspired ergonomics meet premium finish for the ultimate driving experience.
interior.steeringWheelDesc: Race-Tex wrapped with adjustable centre marker.
interior.sportChronoDesc: Analog and digital chronometer designed for lap tracking.
interior.bucketSeatsDesc: Perfect lateral support in carbon fibre reinforced plastic (CFRP).

timeline.title: The Legacy
timeline.subtitle: A journey through time and engineering
timeline.1948desc: Porsche 356, the brand founded by Ferry Porsche
timeline.2019desc: Taycan, Porsche's first all-electric sports car
timeline.futureDesc: A visionary look at the future of the electric hypercar.

cta.title: Experience Excellence
cta.subtitle: Schedule a test drive or visit our Porsche Centre to discover what makes the GT3 RS truly exceptional.

footer.tagline: Engineering excellence and motorsport heritage since 1948.
